description: Minimal triadic regime tensor for SoftKitty. RTT-equivalent structure with softened terminology. Ensures stability across triadic time layers and substrate fields.

regime_tensor.notes: Soft equivalent of RTT's triadic stability tensor.

example_usage.scenario: Evaluating triadic stability of a region
steps: Populate tensor with field values from T1/T2/T3.
Check field alignment across substrate fields.
Confirm triadic consistency across stability modes.
example_usage.expected_outcome: A stable triadic region validated by the SoftKitty regime tensor.
